note: SHA256 of LFS binaries (sam3.pt, sam3.1_multiplex.pt) is recorded during the offline packaging step that runs `huggingface-cli download` with HF_TOKEN. Until then, integrity is anchored on the HF revision SHA below.

1038lab/sam3.note: Non-gated mirror of facebook/sam3 weights. Activated by SAM3_WEIGHTS_SOURCE=mirror. Tokenizer/processor configs are still loaded from the upstream sam3 Python package shipped in the container.

IDEA-Research/grounding-dino-tiny.note: Generic open-vocabulary detector that runs alongside SAM 3 / DOTA-OBB / YOLOv8m_defence. Loaded via transformers AutoModelForZeroShotObjectDetection from the HF cache. Switch to grounding-dino-base for higher accuracy / larger model.

chendelong/RemoteCLIP.note: Optional OpenCLIP-compatible remote-sensing verifier. Scores existing candidate crops only; it never proposes detections.

ultralytics/assets/mobileclip2_b.ts.license: Apple ML-MobileCLIP research license — see https://github.com/apple/ml-mobileclip
ultralytics/assets/mobileclip2_b.ts.note: TorchScript text encoder (~242 MB) used by YOLOE in text-prompt mode. Ultralytics' build_text_model() pulls it via attempt_download_asset() the first time YOLOE.set_classes() runs and writes it to CWD by default — which is the bind-mounted /app at runtime, leaking the asset onto the host. The Dockerfile pre-stages it under /models/torch/ultralytics and inference-sam3/yoloe.py patches attempt_download_asset to resolve it from that path. Override with MOBILECLIP2_TS_PATH if you stage it elsewhere.

fair1m/yolo11m-obb-fair1m.license: Operator-baked from FAIR1M-2.0 dataset (GaoFen Challenge, CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 attribution required)
fair1m/yolo11m-obb-fair1m.note: Trained checkpoint is NOT shipped with the repo. Operators bake it from the FAIR1M-2.0 dataset following docs/operations/fair1m-bake.md (Ultralytics yolo11m-obb base, 100 epochs, imgsz=1024). The runner gracefully no-ops when the file is absent (inference-sam3/fair1m_obb.py:load returns model=None). Place the resulting .pt at assets/static/inference-weights/fair1m/yolo11m-obb-fair1m.pt; the runtime resolves it from FAIR1M_OBB_WEIGHTS_DIR (default /data/inference-weights/fair1m).

mvrsd/mvrsd_yolo11m.license: Operator-supplied fine-tune of Ultralytics yolo11m on the Military Vehicle Remote Sensing Dataset (MVRSD). 5 classes: SMV, LMV, AFV, CV, MCV.
mvrsd/mvrsd_yolo11m.note: Axis-aligned YOLO detect specialist for sub-meter (~0.3 m GSD) optical RGB military scenes. Default-OFF (SAM3_LOAD_MVRSD=0) and only runs when 'mvrsd' is in enabled_layers. Trained weights are hosted as a GitHub RELEASE asset; the orchestrator sets the MVRSD_WEIGHTS_URL build ARG to that asset URL. The Dockerfile.gpu bake step curls it to /models/mvrsd/mvrsd_yolo11m.pt at build time (project hard rule #8: no runtime downloads). When MVRSD_WEIGHTS_URL is empty the bake step is a no-op and mvrsd.load() honour-gates (returns model=None), so existing builds do not break. Runtime path overridable via MVRSD_WEIGHTS_PATH.
